hooks.command: sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks claudecode pre-compact || exit 0'
sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks claudecode session-end || exit 0'
sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks claudecode session-start || exit 0'
sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks claudecode stop || exit 0'
sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks claudecode subagent-stop || exit 0'
sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks claudecode user-prompt-submit || exit 0'
